Pebble app for high frame rate display testing, with build scripts, metadata, and version control settings.

## Folders
- **[src](src/README.md)**: A Pebble app that updates the display at a high frame rate to test system responsiveness.

## Files
- **[.gitignore](.gitignore.md)**: Specifies to ignore build generated files in version control.
- **[appinfo.json](appinfo.json.md)**: Metadata for the "timer_starve" app, including UUID, version, and company information.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling a Pebble project with options to customize build rules.
